name: White Bean Soup with Sage
recipeIngredient: Salt and ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the large onion.
2. Mince the crushed garlic.
3. Peel and shred the small carrots.
4. Dice any available tomatoes (if using).
5. Mince the sage leaves or substitute with 1 tsp dried sage.
6. Heat oil in a large saucepan until hot.
7. Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and shredded carrots to the pan and sauté until the onion is tender.
8. Stir in the Great Northern beans and add the clear chicken broth can (14.5 oz).
9. Stir in diced tomatoes (if using) and sage leaves or dried sage.
10. Bring the mixture to a boil and stir occasionally.
11. Simmer for about 5 minutes, stirring frequently until flavors are well blended.
12. Season with salt and ground pepper to taste.
13. Serve hot.
14. Makes 4 servings.
